zh.Bodmin, Cornwall, England, United Kingdo: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾博德明
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Carminow於大約1280年出生在英國可瓦爾時，他的父親Roger Carminow42歲，母親Joanna Dinham29歲。他於1319年與Johanna Glynn在英國可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1332年11月24日在英國可瓦爾博德明享年53歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾博德明。

zh-hans.Bodmin, Cornwall, England, United Kingdo: 英国英格兰可瓦爾博德明
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Carminow于大约1280年出生在英国可瓦爾时，他的父亲Roger Carminow42岁，母亲Joanna Dinham29岁。他于1319年与Johanna Glynn在英国可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1332年11月24日在英国可瓦爾博德明享年53岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾博德明。

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Carminow was born about 1280, in Cornwall, England, his father, Roger Carminow, was 42 and his mother, Joanna Dinham, was 29. He married Johanna Glynn in 1319, in Cornwall, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 24 November 1332, in Bodmin, Cornwall, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Bodmin, Cornwall, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Carminow est né environ 1280, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Roger Carminow, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Joanna Dinham, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Johanna Glynn en 1319, à Cornouailles, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 24 novembre 1332, à Bodmin, Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Bodmin, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Carminow um 1280 in Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger Carminow 42 und seine Mutter Joanna Dinham 29. Er hat 1319 in Cornwall, England Johanna Glynn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 24. November 1332 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Bodmin, Cornwall, England und wurde in Bodmin, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Carminow è nato il circa 1280 nel Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Roger Carminow, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Joanna Dinham, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Johanna Glynn nel 1319, nel Cornwall, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 24 novembre 1332, nel Bodmin, Cornwall, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Bodmin, Cornwall, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Carminowが約1280年にイギリスコルンワルで生まれた時，父Roger Carminowは42歳，母Joanna Dinhamは29歳であった。1319年にイギリスコルンワルでJohanna Glynnと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1332年11月24日にイギリスコルンワルボドミンで53歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルボドミンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Carminow(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 코른월에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger Carminow(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Joanna Dinham(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1319년 영국 코른월에서 Johanna Glynn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1332년 11월 24일 영국 코른월 보드민에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 보드민에 묻혔다.

mn.Bodmin, Cornwall, England, United Kingdo: Bosvena, Kernev, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Carminow nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger Carminow, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Joanna Dinham, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Johanna Glynn em 1319, em Cornwall, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 24 de novembro de 1332, em Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Carminow родился около 1280 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger Carminow было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Joanna Dinham, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Johanna Glynn в 1319 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Он умер 24 ноября 1332 г. в местности бодминь, корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности бодминь, корнвалл, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir John Carminow nació aproximadamente 1280, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, su papá, Roger Carminow, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Joanna Dinham, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Johanna Glynn en 1319, en Cornwall, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 24 de noviembre de 1332, en Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Bodmin, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
